The Northern Pacific quotes one
and a third fare on certificate plan
on the Clearwater and Palouse
branches, the Washington Central
and main line from Hope, Idaho, to
Pasco, Wash, and Washington &
Columbia River to Lewiston on ac-
count of the Nez Perez County
Sporting association meeting at
Lewiston, Dec. to 7.


j. p. O'Brien, superintendent of

ton. Mr.. O'Brien has charge of

ern Pacific is in the city.
